name: Ktima Kostas Lazaridis S.A.
summary: Ktima Kostas Lazaridis S.A. engages in the production and sale of wines in Greece. It offers various families of wines, including Amethystos, Ch√É¬¢teau Julia, Domaine Costa Lazaridi, Oenotria Land, and Oenodea. The company also provides Idoniko Tsipouro, Idoniko Ouzo, and various Methexis grape distills; Botanico balsamic vinegars; and Magnum. It exports its products to approximately 23 countries worldwide. The company was founded in 1979 and is based in Drama, Greece.
